name: Jewel
description: Faceted gem diamonds with a bright table and shadowed pavilion, re-cut on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: var(--color0); :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 5%, 80% 35%, 50% 50%, 20% 35%); clip-path: polygon(50% 5%, 80% 35%, 50% 50%, 20% 35%); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(20% 35%, 50% 50%, 80% 35%, 50% 95%); clip-path: polygon(20% 35%, 50% 50%, 80% 35%, 50% 95%); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
